commands.command: /bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1,240p' docs/plans/README.md; git status --short --branch; rg -n --hidden --glob '"'!'"\\.git/**' \"permissionSnapshot|AuthorizationService|PermissionGate|NexusFlow|平台角色|租户成员\" ."
